label: Norway (NO2)
data_quality: solar: not reported by the TSO in this window — ENTSO-E generation-per-type reporting (16.1.B&C) is mandatory only for technologies above ~1% of national generation, so small fleets are legitimately absent

PS: 805 half-hours missing in 10 gap(s) — absent from the TSO submission, shown as gaps, never interpolated. E.g. 06 Jun 16:00→10 Jun 04:00; 10 Jun 15:30→11 Jun 03:30; 11 Jun 06:30→11 Jun 16:00 (+7 more)

price.name: NO_2 day-ahead auction price
price.notes: True auction price — unlike GB's MID proxy. Currency is EUR, not GBP.

generation_by_fuel.name: NO_2 actual generation per production type
generation_by_fuel.notes: Fossil Gas mapped to CCGT (ENTSO-E does not split CCGT/OCGT); Wind On+Offshore summed into WIND — coverage differs from Elexon's transmission-only metering. See plan/04-europe-extension.md.
